subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1913-02-17 in Paris
subcodes.first_line: In truth, there is not a single person in Persia today who is adept and knowledgeable, nor can any individual keely aware be found
subcodes.first_line_orig: فی الحقیقه یک نفر کاردان دانا در ایران نبود و نفس آگاهی یافت نشد حال باُمید
subcodes.subjects: @past, present and future of Iran, @critique of Eastern values; culture, @rejection, opposition and persecution
